postReview.title: Bosnia-Herzegovina 1-2 Germany: Undav double secures second Nations League win

preReview.title: Nagelsmann: Football must take inspiration from NBA, NFL over schedule
preReview.description: Julian Nagelsmann has told FIFA and UEFA to draw inspiration from the way players' recovery time is handled in the NBA and the NFL.
